task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-2 (Loan Wizard, 'create everything'). Closes the QBO gap (loan-for-asset setup is a manual multi-step process). One form -> all transactions: inputs (asset(s), purchase price, down payment, from-account, loan amount, rate, term, first-payment date, lender). Auto-creates (gated, preview-first, on confirm): (a) Note Payable liability account, (b) FH-1 fixed asset(s) + depreciation schedule, (c) down-payment cash transaction, (d) FH-3 amortization schedule, (e) balanced opening JE (Dr Asset / Cr Note Payable / Cr Cash, balance-or-fail). Trade-in/fees/taxes capitalize into asset basis (QBO guidance); trade-in can dispose an existing asset. Multiple assets on one loan (finance.loan_assets split). Wizard run audit record. Consumes FH-1 + FH-3. NO code, no DDL, no posting. VOID != DELETE. Flag LOAN_WIZARD_ENABLED default OFF. Designed live with Jorge + GUARD-verifies-vs-QuickBooks before merge.
